info.name: QuickBite v2 (Spring Security + RBAC)
info.description: Auth: /auth/** is public. All other endpoints require HTTP Basic Auth (email + password). Roles: CUSTOMER, RESTAURANT, DELIVERY_AGENT, ADMIN.

item.name: Auth (Step 1 - Create User)
item.description: Public endpoints — no auth header needed.

item.name: QB-5 Register Delivery Agent - Duplicate Email (409)
Customer (Step 2 - Create Profile)
item.description: POST requires CUSTOMER role. GET summary/all/delete requires ADMIN.

item.name: QB-1 Create Customer Profile - User Not Found (404)
QB-1 Create Customer Profile - Wrong Role (409)
QB-1 Create Customer Profile - Duplicate Profile (409)
QB-1 Create Customer Profile - Missing Name (400)
QB-10 Get Customer Orders - Not Found (404)
Restaurant (Step 2 - Create Profile)
item.description: Profile creation and menu management require RESTAURANT role. Browse endpoints are open to any authenticated user.

Orders
item.description: Place order: CUSTOMER. Assign/update status: DELIVERY_AGENT or ADMIN. View details/total: CUSTOMER/RESTAURANT/DELIVERY_AGENT/ADMIN. Filter by status: ADMIN.

QB-16 Update Status - PLACED to CANCELLED (DELIVERY_AGENT)
Menu
item.description: Search and browse: any authenticated user. Top 3: ADMIN or RESTAURANT.
